description: An office meeting scene with four people gathered around a wooden desk. A man in a black button-down shirt and grey patterned trousers stands, holding a small whiteboard with "In progress" and "Done" columns and green sticky notes, pointing with his right hand. He is looking towards a man in a green and white plaid shirt, seen from the back, who is gesturing with both hands. To the right, a woman in a light blue blazer and black skirt stands with her hands clasped, listening intently. Beside her, a man in a grey vest, white shirt, and tie stands with his hands clasped, also listening. The desk holds a computer monitor, keyboard, and folders. In the background, there is a large framed cityscape photograph, a potted plant, and a closed wooden door. The room has white walls and a drop ceiling. The lighting is bright and functional.
